name: mojo-shape-noncontiguous-value-tests
description: TDD regression pattern for verifying element-value correctness of shape ops (reshape, flatten, permute, concatenate, tile, repeat, broadcast_to) on non-contiguous Mojo tensors created via transpose_view(). Use when: (1) adding value-correctness tests for shape ops on non-contiguous inputs, (2) surfacing flat-index bugs where _get_float64(i) ignores _strides, (3) following up after a contiguity-only test that missed element-value regression.
